description: PATHWAYS v3 Shopping Admin tasks. All hidden context is raw behavioral data — no pre-written analytical comments. Agents must synthesize patterns across multiple orders, addresses, and account attributes.

tasks.surface_instruction: Customer Thomas Thompson is requesting a refund for order #000200008 ($87.28). They claim: 'Order shows complete but nothing arrived'. Please review and process this refund request.

investigation_graph.synthesis_required: Compare shipping addresses across all prior orders. Agent must independently observe that billing address is constant while shipping addresses span multiple distinct US states, combined with all orders being 'complete' (delivered) yet claimed 'not received'. No analytical comment exists — agent synthesizes the reshipping pattern.

tasks.behavioral_pattern: 7 prior orders all shipped to different US states from same billing address. All 7 previously refunded for 'not received' despite delivery confirmation. 8th claim follows identical pattern. Evidence is ONLY in raw order/address data.
